[2020-12-09 19:14] velizar_ (Name): aegis seemed meaningless in theory, then I realized that this allows you to have an absorber without buying blue.

--- Thread (45 messages, 2020-12-11) ---
[2020-12-11 03:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): exams are over, i can talk now
[2020-12-11 03:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): the thing about new trinity and new thorium
[2020-12-11 03:30] masn6811 (Masne98888): they're an experiment in making BP stronger, yes
[2020-12-11 03:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): but the result is its not that good since you just kill gauss cannons
[2020-12-11 03:31] masn6811 (Masne98888): this was the same problem i was talking about earlier about base BP being too weak and the enablers been too good to make up for it
[2020-12-11 03:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): if we had gauss cannons at 6, we could drop the hp of thorium/trinity a bit and end up with a bit healthier an experience imo
[2020-12-11 03:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): also, this change is prolly too radical, but i just had a thought of making forcefields 3G and 3hp to cement the idea that green is supposed to be a tad better at soak than blue
[2020-12-11 03:39] awaclus: so what if you just kill geese
[2020-12-11 03:41] awaclus: it used to be the case that you would target Trinity/Thorium first because they were more vulnerable than geese, and BP was sometimes playable
[2020-12-11 03:42] awaclus: now BP has been buffed so you kill geese first because they're the most vulnerable thing, not having been buffed
[2020-12-11 03:44] awaclus: the only reason to buff geese is if you want to further buff BP, which seems like a hot take
[2020-12-11 03:45] xyotsuba: dude if u change gauss cannon elyot has to do so much work
[2020-12-11 03:45] xyotsuba: it will never make it in the main game its a waste of time to worry about it
[2020-12-11 03:45] masn6811 (Masne98888): the idea is to add a bit of hp to geese at the expense of the hp of trinity/thorium
[2020-12-11 03:45] xyotsuba: gauss getting killed first is fine
[2020-12-11 03:46] xyotsuba: i agree with awaclus that bp needing buffs is a hot take as well
[2020-12-11 03:48] masn6811 (Masne98888): im not sure it is a hot take. it seems like the type of thing that requires venge or magna to be a thing
[2020-12-11 03:49] xyotsuba: yeah and thats not a problem that bp needs bp unique units to be good
[2020-12-11 03:50] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think its entirely a problem. its not very deep for a strategy to only be worth consideration if only one of two specific units (well, i suppose iceblade as well) is in the set
[2020-12-11 03:53] awaclus: 10ggbb 2 drones bt2 3/14 attacker that clicks for 5 damage and 3 exhaust
[2020-12-11 03:53] xyotsuba: there is bp in fab as well
[2020-12-11 03:54] xyotsuba: if u want more bp u should be rallying for ebb to be a bp drone instead of it becoming squishier
[2020-12-11 03:54] xyotsuba: u say u want bp to become "deeper" which to me would be more unique random set units that cause bp not buffing gauss to 6hp
[2020-12-11 03:54] masn6811 (Masne98888): no, more random set units is more "find the busted enabler"
[2020-12-11 03:55] masn6811 (Masne98888): if base bp was a bit less sucky, then the enablers don't have to be quite as busted to make bp viable
[2020-12-11 03:55] masn6811 (Masne98888): we tried ebb at 3hp. the problem is thats just too bp for blue's color pie
[2020-12-11 03:55] awaclus: it's not necessary for bp to be viable very often
[2020-12-11 03:56] xyotsuba: bp being viable more often and bp being "deeper" are 2 different things
[2020-12-11 03:56] masn6811 (Masne98888): look, 7-10% of the time is enough
[2020-12-11 03:56] awaclus: it's fine if we have sucky base bp and balanced enablers
[2020-12-11 03:56] masn6811 (Masne98888): "deeper" in the sense that you can't just look at the set and follow a 2-cell flowchart to decide whether to go bp
[2020-12-11 03:56] awaclus: sometimes there's more than one enabler and that makes it viable, or there's a strategy that gets countered by bp and that makes it viable
[2020-12-11 03:57] masn6811 (Masne98888): We had a lot of players, especially beginners, saying 'Frost brooder is so op! It's crazy!' It's not op. Obviously Frost Brooder is horrible against Gauss Cannons.
[2020-12-11 03:58] xyotsuba: i hope elyot just comes and says "no" to changing gauss cannon so we can move on
[2020-12-11 03:58] masn6811 (Masne98888): this is the same philosphy that tells you 3 cost silver and 6 cost gold, is fine because there's "balanced enablers"?
[2020-12-11 03:59] awaclus: no, the philosophy that tells me 3 cost silver and 6 cost gold is fine is that big money is a boring strategy and it's good for the game if it's never viable
[2020-12-11 03:59] awaclus: Prismata BP is not quite as boring so it's fine for it to be viable sometimes
[2020-12-11 04:01] masn6811 (Masne98888): prismata BP is imo about as equally boring as small red.
note that will small red, the base set tarsiers are not so sucky, and thus we had to nerf all the enablers that would be "balanced" by the standards of BP
[2020-12-11 04:02] xyotsuba: dude. if u bother with something thats actually changeable u will get better results. im done here.
[2020-12-11 04:03] masn6811 (Masne98888): look, we're bothering with electrovore, which is probably at least as hard to actually change
[2020-12-11 04:03] masn6811 (Masne98888): and we're getting so much better games for it
[2020-12-11 04:03] xyotsuba: electrovore isnt in every single campaign or challenge mission
[2020-12-11 04:08] xyotsuba: too much work for elyot
[2020-12-11 04:30] jeacaveo (jeacaveo (#NeverBrowserer)): he has. no changes to base set units.
[2020-12-11 04:35] elyot: We can do it for the event but it'll never ship 😛

--- Thread (46 messages, 2020-12-11) ---
[2020-12-11 21:47] anesotericman (Esoteric): @SilentSlayers I don't think the gauss charge was unplayably bad in general, I think the iso/gauss strat is just weak vs infusion, doomed mech, poly, redeemer. iN1SV-4izvl
[2020-12-11 21:47] silentslayers: yeah sure im just saying it would've made my position way better and maybe winning
[2020-12-11 21:47] silentslayers: it seemed close until the g charges came in
[2020-12-11 21:48] anesotericman (Esoteric): definitely way stronger with 3LS, yeah. Too strong, imo
[2020-12-11 21:48] silentslayers: if it synched with mine even at 5 BT it would've been better than 4 BT off synch right?
[2020-12-11 21:48] silentslayers: thats what im trying to complain about
[2020-12-11 21:48] silentslayers: it doesnt work with isos
[2020-12-11 21:49] anesotericman (Esoteric): cluster still works with iso though, so I don't see that as a problem
[2020-12-11 21:49] silentslayers: Yeah I dont either really. just felt bad xd
[2020-12-11 21:50] anesotericman (Esoteric): yup, not great. I guess things with 3 exhaust are normally clickable (scorch, wincer) which lets them sync with isos in low numbers
[2020-12-11 21:51] xyotsuba: i would much rather have gauss charge deleted than some weird echo gauss charge that confuses what a gauss charge actually is.
[2020-12-11 21:51] anesotericman (Esoteric): seems cleaner as a bt1 eshaust 3 1 damage attacker
[2020-12-11 21:51] anesotericman (Esoteric): if you wanted same offense
[2020-12-11 21:52] anesotericman (Esoteric): but of all the proposed designs so far, I like deletion the best
[2020-12-11 21:52] xyotsuba: why are we even changing gauss carge to weird ass shit. just remove it from the pool and create whatever as a new unit if u really want something.
[2020-12-11 21:52] xyotsuba: i dont think any of the replacements are interesting
[2020-12-11 21:52] elyot: ^^ we would do precisely that
[2020-12-11 21:53] elyot: (remove and create new unit)
[2020-12-11 21:54] anesotericman (Esoteric): what if we got weird with it. 2g-> 1 damage and a green
[2020-12-11 21:55] anesotericman (Esoteric): there's enough green sinks, we don't really need another
[2020-12-11 21:55] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): I suggested 1g -> 1 damage and 1 gold at one point, but, *shrug*
[2020-12-11 21:55] Deleted User (Deleted User): if gauss charge is deleted, how does that interact with units which create gauss charge
[2020-12-11 21:55] shadourow (Rando): Forcefield is already a fairly good enough green sink imo
[2020-12-11 21:55] anesotericman (Esoteric): same as every other game in the turn-based genre, cooled
[2020-12-11 21:56] anesotericman (Esoteric): hard to think of a card game that doesn't have token you can make that aren't cards
[2020-12-11 21:56] shadourow (Rando): The problem is that you need an art for that token
[2020-12-11 21:56] anesotericman (Esoteric): Prismata included, if you include lifespan stuff
[2020-12-11 21:57] shadourow (Rando): So you can't replace the gauss charge by a new unit
[2020-12-11 21:57] anesotericman (Esoteric): Plan with the event version was for Elyot to do a quick copy+paste for new art for the buyable Gauss Charge
[2020-12-11 21:57] anesotericman (Esoteric): and leave the summoned ones alone
[2020-12-11 21:58] anesotericman (Esoteric): sure you could do something similar to represent some more green stuff
[2020-12-11 21:58] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): It could be ok to still have around just to enable base + 7 games ;d
[2020-12-11 21:59] anesotericman (Esoteric): I'm kind of feeling My 2G->XG  gauss charge now. Any thoughts? Should be fine, inflation wise, and isn't quite like anything else.
[2020-12-11 22:00] anesotericman (Esoteric): better than live version, I think. Still on the weak side, definitely
[2020-12-11 22:00] elyot: I mean existing gauss charge is also really weak
[2020-12-11 22:00] elyot: this seems worse to me? maybe it isnt
[2020-12-11 22:00] elyot: like it's no longer a green sink
[2020-12-11 22:01] anesotericman (Esoteric): yeah, but it still lets you "use" the green
[2020-12-11 22:01] anesotericman (Esoteric): it's more interesting than live version to me.
[2020-12-11 22:01] anesotericman (Esoteric): I say this without any testing, but am curious about the design space
[2020-12-11 22:01] megasupp (mega-supp): Just delete gauss charge from the pool ffs. We already have a unit that is a green sink that gives you attack. It's called cluster bolt.
[2020-12-11 22:02] megasupp (mega-supp): Gauss charge is really just an interior cluster
[2020-12-11 22:02] shadourow (Rando): Feels racist, but agreed
[2020-12-11 22:03] Deleted User (Deleted User): I think I said smth smth about how above a certain inflation goose charge is better than cluster
[2020-12-11 22:05] anesotericman (Esoteric): At high enough inflation, floating a gold is better than Lucy
[2020-12-11 22:06] anesotericman (Esoteric): well, not quite true. You would rather have 1 gold than a bought lucy
